_comment: Illustrative Codex hooks for the Card-Krueger DiD project. Copy to .codex/hooks.json, trust hooks with /hooks in the Codex CLI, and verify event names in your installed version.

hooks.statusMessage: Run Card-Krueger verification after editing the DiD script

hooks.command: python3 -c "import datetime; open('notes/orchestration_log.md', 'a').write(f'\n| {datetime.datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\")} | Codex session stopped | — | Review diff before merge |')"
hooks.statusMessage: Append stop event to orchestration log
